base_templates: The facial expression is characterized by {}.
1: brows pulled up at the center
the inner corners of the eyebrows moved upwards
l1: left brow pulled up at the center
the inner corner of the left eyebrow moved upwards
r1: right brow pulled up at the center
the inner corner of the right eyebrow moved upwards
2: the outer tails of the eyebrows raised
the outer corners of the eyebrows moved upwards
l2: the outer tail of the left eyebrow raised
the outer corner of the left eyebrow moved upwards
r2: the outer tail of the right eyebrow raised
the outer corner of the right eyebrow moved upwards
4: inner eyebrows pulled down and inwards
l4: left inner eyebrow pulled down and inwards
r4: right inner eyebrow pulled down and inwards
6: skin below the eyes bunching up
lower eyelids pushed up from below
l6: skin below the left eye bunching up
left lower eyelid pushed up from below
r6: skin below the right eye bunching up
right lower eyelid pushed up from below
7: both upper and lower lids moved toward each other
l7: both upper and lower left lids moved toward each other
r7: both upper and lower right lids moved toward each other
l9: the left side of the nose bridge wrinkled upwards
the left side of the nose wrinkling upwards
skin on the left side of the nose wrinkled
left nose bridge skin bunching up
10: upper lip raised exposing upper teeth
12: lip corners pulled upwards and outwards
the corners of the mouth pulled upwards
the corners of the mouth raised diagonally
l12: the left corner of the mouth pulled upwards
the left corner of the mouth raised diagonally
r12: the right corner of the mouth pulled upwards
the right corner of the mouth raised diagonally
14: the corners of the mouth tightened inwards
lips pressed together at the corners
l14: the left corner of the mouth tightened inwards
a dimple formed at the left mouth corner
lip pressed together at the left corner
r14: the right corner of the mouth tightened inwards
a dimple formed at the right mouth corner
lip pressed together at the right corner
15: the corners of the mouth pulled downwards
l15: the left corner of the mouth pulled downwards
r15: the right corner of the mouth pulled downwards
17: dimpling and wrinkling on the chin
l20: left mouth corner pulled sideways horizontally
left lip corner pulled straight back
r20: right mouth corner pulled sideways horizontally
right lip corner pulled straight back
23: the red part of the lips becoming less visible
24: the upper and lower lips compressed against each other
both lips moved toward each other and compressed
25: a small gap appearing between the lips
the upper and lower lips moved apart
26: mouth opening with the jaw moving downwards
28: lips sucked inwards into the mouth
lips rolled in with no red visible
lips drawn inwards and pressed against the teeth
lips rolled inwards over the teeth
38: the nostrils widening and flaring outwards
nostril wings pulled outwards and open
nostrils flared open on both sides
39: the sides of the nose pulled in
nostril wings pulled inwards and closed
nostrils compressed to reduce the opening
